homepage.title: Navendu Mishra MP
homepage.text_excerpt: Navendu Mishra MP 0 Skip to Content Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up Folder: FAQs Back Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Standing up for Stockport I am Navendu Mishra. I was elected as the Labour Member of Parliament for Stockport at the 2019 General Election and re-elected in 2024. Stockport is home - where my family and I live. As such, it is a huge honour to represent the town. Before entering politics, I worked as a shop-floor trade unionist in Stockport, before becoming an organiser for UNISON trade union, where I organised care workers in precarious employment to fight for better rights and working conditions. It was witnessing first-hand how badly workers across all sectors were treated that inspired me to become active in the Labour Party and stand for election. Prior to this, I was a member of the Labour Party’s National Executive Committee between 2018 and my election to the House of Commons in December 2019, serving as one of the nine Constituency Labour Party representatives. I am passionate about standing up for Stockport in the House of Commons - working on vital local priorities like securing funding for Stepping Hill Hospital, improving public transport links, fighting for investment in Stockport railway station, tackling the urgent need for more social housing, and much more. I am currently the Chair of the All-Party Parliamentary Group (APPG) on Cancer, working to improve outcomes for all people affected by cancer, and I am a member of a number of other groups working on a range of national matters, including Parkinson’s, Fairtrade & Cricket. I am also a member of the House of Commons Administration Committee which oversees parliamentary services and facilities, ensuring the smooth functioning of our Parliament. I am proud to be a member of both GMB and USDAW trade unions, as well as the Vice Chair of the Fire Brigades Union Parliamentary Group, and I continue to stand up for working people across Stockport and beyond. If you live in Stockport constituency, you can get in touch with me using the details below: Email: navendu.mishra.mp@parliament.uk Post: 102 Princes Street, Stockport, SK1 1RJ Telephone: 0161 480 0833. pages.title: Contact — Navendu Mishra MP
pages.h1: Please get in touch with me using the details below.
pages.text_excerpt: Contact — Navendu Mishra MP 0 Skip to Content Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up FAQs Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Open Menu Close Menu Home Stockport News Newsletter Sign Up Folder: FAQs Back Local Labour Councillors Advice Surgeries Useful Links Office Standards Contact Please get in touch with me using the details below. I can only act on behalf of my own constituents. There is a strict parliamentary convention preventing MPs from taking up cases on behalf of constituents of other MPs. Your MP will be able to help you deal with an organisation wherever the organisation is based in the country. If you are unsure of who your MP is, you can check by visiting Find Your MP . Please include your full name, address and contact number in all correspondence. My office is located on the high street in the heart of Stockport - 102 Princes Street, Stockport, SK1 1RJ. It is important to me that I learn from my constituents their concerns and opinions. My office is generally open Monday to Friday and my team will deal with visitors between 10:00 hrs and 15:30 hrs. When there are staff absences or training taking place the office may be closed to the public. I hold regular advice surgeries in my office as well as coffee mornings and drop-ins across the different wards in Stockport. Should you wish to make an appointment please get in touch. Email: navendu.mishra.mp@parliament.uk Post: 102 Princes Street Stockport SK1 1RJ Telephone: 0161 480 0833 Social Media: Follow my work in Parliament for Stockport on Facebook . Get in touch: navendu.mishra.mp@parliament.uk Privacy Policy Disability Access Promoted by Hollie Ridley at 20 Rushworth Street, London, SE1 0RB
